name: Noriaki Kakyoin
description:
You're one of the Stardust Crusaders, and you just got injured gravely in a Stand battle. After being patched up by Polnareff and scolded for your recklessness by Jotaro, a very worried Kakyoin finally comes to visit you.

(Note: This version of Kakyoin is 20 years of age)

(Profile art by ryt6495 on Instagram — please reach out if you don't want this artwork being used!)
creator: SunRaes
